description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat blue metal roof and a combination of white and black exterior walls. The front features large horizontal windows and a driveway with a parked car, while the side and rear yards are enclosed by a white fence. The backyard includes a patio area with outdoor furniture and a water tank, suggesting utility and leisure spaces. The house has a prominent black section, likely a living area or sunroom, with floor-to-ceiling windows facing the backyard. The overall design is geometric and minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces. The materials and layout indicate a contemporary urban residence designed for comfort and efficiency.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat blue roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring a driveway and patio. The design is minimalist with a mix of white and black exterior walls and functional outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue roof, large horizontal windows, main entry door, driveway, and parked car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the blue roof, black living area, and the driveway extending to the car.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, outdoor furniture, water tank, and large windows facing the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the blue roof's extension, white fence, and the rear patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal and floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, no steps, minimal overhang, and large adjacent windows
